name: Fenugreek
summary: Fenugreek entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: moderate metabolic.
description: Fenugreek is cataloged as saponin/alkaloid botanical. Reported mechanisms: glucose metabolism modulation; possible 5-alpha-reductase/aromatase effects preclinical.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.6: Human evidence exists for libido/metabolic markers, but testosterone claims should remain conservative.
claimMap.notes: v9.6: Human evidence exists for libido/metabolic markers, but testosterone claims should remain conservative.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Fenugreek dose varies; many extracts use 500–600 mg/day in human studies

sources.title: PubMed PMID 28266134. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
